data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against distributed denial-of-service attacks to maintain high uptime.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and AWS WAF for DDoS mitigation.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption in transit and at rest for all customer data.
data.technical_spec: Use of TLS and AES-256 encryption standards.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Comprehensive identity orchestration for managing user access.
data.technical_spec: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies and roles.

data.title: Security Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring for suspicious activity and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: AWS CloudTrail and Amazon GuardDuty for threat detection.

data.title: Secure Software Development Lifecycle
data.description: Incorporation of security in every phase of software development.
data.technical_spec: Adoption of CI/CD pipelines with security testing and audits.
